name: Amaretto Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. Grease a shallow pan with oil.
3. In a small bowl, mix the nuts and amaretto until well combined.
4. Spread the mixture in a single layer in the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes at 300°F (150°C), stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from oven and let cool.
